full_prompt: Design the chassis of a Rescue-league robot for an urban-search-and-rescue robotics benchmark. The robot size class is Small (bounding box within 500 mm x 500 mm x 500 mm). Total robot mass must not exceed 20 kg. The chassis must traverse a standard Rescue arena ramp at 45 degrees incline and a stair-step obstacle with step height 150 mm and step depth 250 mm. The robot carries a 5 kg payload (sensor package) on its top deck. Under a 2 g vertical shock (landing off the top of a step) the chassis must not plastically yield, and the top deck must not deflect more than 3 mm. Under a lateral impact of 100 N at the payload CG the chassis must not yield. Flipper arms (if present) must carry the robot's full weight when elevating a wheel; worst-case flipper root stress is evaluated with the full 20 kg weight applied 200 mm out from the flipper hinge. Primary verification is linear static structural FEA for self-weight-on-flipper, 2 g vertical shock, and lateral impact cases. Kinematic reachability of the 45-deg ramp and 150 mm step is computed from CAD (non-FEA). Vibration, thermal, fluid, and radiation analyses are explicitly NOT required. Deliverables: STEP AP242 of the chassis + flipper arm, a mass budget, and a report listing total robot mass in kg, max chassis stress per case in MPa, top deck deflection at 2 g in mm, and flipper root stress in MPa.
short_prompt:
Design the chassis of a Rescue-league robot (Small class) for an urban-search-and-rescue robotics benchmark. Bounding box <= 500 x 500 x 500 mm; total robot mass <= 20 kg. Must traverse a 45-degree Rescue ramp and a 150 mm step (250 mm step depth) - kinematic check from CAD. Carries a 5 kg sensor payload on the top deck.

Load cases on the chassis.
- LC1 self-weight 2 g vertical shock (landing off a step): 25 kg x 2 g (~490 N); top-deck deflection <= 3 mm.
- LC2 lateral impact: 100 N at the payload CG, no plastic yield.
- LC3 flipper-arm cantilever: the flipper-arm root carries the full 20 kg robot weight applied 200 mm from the hinge (~196 N).

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: Ramp traversal and step-climbing are geometric, not FEA.

prompt.title: Rescue-league robot chassis
prompt.brief: Design a 20 kg, 500 mm-box Rescue robot with flipper arms that climbs 45 deg ramps and 150 mm steps.
